meta.title: Zambia CDC 2024 Art and Design Syllabus — Structured RAG Dataset
meta.source: Ministry of Education, Curriculum Development Centre — ART-AND-DESIGN-SYLLABUS-FINAL.pdf
meta.purpose: Structured curriculum data for AI-assisted quiz, lesson plan, and assessment generation. Each record maps to one embeddable chunk aligned to official CDC competences.
meta.subject: Art and Design
meta.extractionNote: Shift-corrected extract (detected_shift=29, confidence=0.964) + deterministic CDC table parse. No fabricated content.
